name: Our California Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Bunch Broccoli, Tops Only, Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
To make crust, lay crescent rolls pieces flat on an ungreased cookie sheet.
If desired for a thinner crust, roll or pat the pieces.
Bake for about 11 minutes or until brown.
Cool completely.
For the filling, blend cream cheese, mayonnaise, and pesto in a food processor or mixer until smooth.
Add sun-dried tomatoes and garlic; blend just to combine. Set aside.
In a separate bowl, combine all topping ingredients.
Just before serving, spread the filling on the cooled crust.
Sprinkle with topping ingredients, pressing firmly into the filling.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Cut into squares.
Serves 4 as a luncheon dish.
